text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Phew... Well, I know I gave it my all.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I want to win next time... O-or is that asking
too much? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I want to win next time... O-or is that asking
too much? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I think I was able to do so well because you're
with me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I think I was able to do so well because you're
with me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm useless by myself... but if we're together, I
know I can do better.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So let's start practicing for the next race!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uh, I-I mean, I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
S-so I should aim for first place after all, huh?
Okay, then I've got to work even harder!
